target.name: Astera Labs
target.founder: Jitendra Mohan, Sanjay Gajendra, Casey Morrison

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $1.0B - $23.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 20.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Cerebras
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $23B

private.name: Credo Semiconductor
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $5B+

private.name: Ouster
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $1.5B

private.name: Aeva Technologies
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Astera Labs is a public-stage semiconductor company that has raised over $100M. Valuation analysis draws from a peer set of 4 same-sector, same-stage comparables in Chips & Semiconductors: Cerebras ($23.0B), Credo Semiconductor ($5.0B), Ouster ($1.5B), and Aeva Technologies ($1.0B).

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach here. The median valuation across these four public semiconductor peers is $3.2B, with a range spanning $1.0B to $23.0B. A Public-Comp Anchoring approach using the 20.6x P/S median across public semiconductor tickers (ALAB, NVDA, AMD) cannot be applied, as target revenue is not on file—a common constraint with private company data. The peer-median result therefore anchors the analysis.

The triangulation supports a valuation range of $2.8B to $3.7B, centered on $3.2B. This range reflects the median of observable public comparables in the same sector and stage. Key uncertainties include the wide dispersion within the peer set (five-fold gap between min and max), the limited applicability of revenue multiples without disclosure, and whether Astera Labs' specific technology, market position, or growth trajectory justifies positioning within this range or toward its edges.
